meta.name: baijiahao-team-icon-shape-specs

source.library: 百家号PC Component / icon / 基础元素

meta.purpose: Guardrail-only shape notes. Exact mature-library reuse must extract/inspect Figma source node at runtime; do not use this file for standard preview or final drawing.
rules: Use team-icon-index.json for semantic matching only.
Do not use this file to render mature-library standard previews.
Do not use this file to draw final mature-library icons.
For exact mature-library hits, read/extract the Figma source node or source screenshot first.
These notes are guardrails for what to preserve/avoid after source extraction.

mustKeep: arrow and tray as separate mature source parts

specs.name: 内容分销
specs.label: 内容分销

geometrySignature.summary: Rounded diamond/hexagon container with open left/right waist and centered Y-shaped distribution branch.
mustKeep: open left and right waist gaps
top and bottom chevron-like container strokes
single lower vertical stem splitting into two upper arms
forbidden: thin line Y that loses visual weight

specs.name: 智能诊断
specs.label: 智能诊断

geometrySignature.summary: Magnifier outline with short diagonal handle and centered thick diagnostic pulse/waveform inside the lens.
mustKeep: inner diagnostic pulse with left horizontal segment, center peak/drop, and right horizontal segment
pulse sits inside lens without touching lens border
forbidden: dense ECG line with many peaks
waveform touching or crossing lens border

specs.downgradeReason: Not yet verified against mature Figma source screenshot/node structure; cannot claim mature standard preview.

source.adaptation_notes: Source-locked mature intelligent diagnosis; preserve magnifier plus centered diagnostic waveform.
